examples: She is in a loveless relationship.
She felt locked in a loveless marriage.
Oh, I know, I know, it's meant to be so tragic–poor woman, trapped in a loveless marriage, yadda yadda yadda.
To be loved, baby, hard, at once, and forever, to strengthen you against the loveless world.
Despite 13 loveless years, Radha, played by the eminent actress Shabana Azmi, remains a model wife.
